10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve – Easier inflation made simple - Bike-Discount
10.evidenceText: Product description and FAQ content provided, but no retail price information was included in the extracted page content
10.extractionRationale: The source page content does not contain any numerical price values in EUR or any other currency. Only product information and feature descriptions are present.

27.evidenceText: Three distinct Clik Valve product pages identified: (1) p1859949.html - 60mm, (2) p1859948.html - 40mm, (3) p1859950.html - 80mm. Source 4 is a category page, Source 5 is an inner tube accessory.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product URLs for Clik Valve products only. Excluded category pages and accessories (inner tubes with Clik Valve). Three distinct product pages with different specifications (40mm, 60mm, 80mm variants) were identified.

30.evidenceText: No stock status indicators found in any of the 5 product listings provided. The content shows product descriptions but does not include availability/stock status information.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status information is not present in any of the provided product page excerpts. Cannot determine the percentage of out-of-stock listings without this critical data.

56.evidenceText: Schwalbe Schlauch - Nr. 15, Nr. 13, Nr. 12, Nr. 3 | Clik Valve; No. 19 | 40-62/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV); No. 17 | 28-47/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV); No. 19L-EL (Extra Light) - 54/75-622 | Clik Valve
56.extractionRationale: Counted distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve interface from across sources. Source 1 lists product images for tubes No. 15, 13, 12, 3. Sources 2 and 3 detail tubes No. 19 and No. 17 with specific size ranges. Source 4 identifies No. 19L-EL as a distinct model variant. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit) and valve accessories as per requirements. No. 3 appears truncated in source 1 but counted as distinct from numbered models.

61.evidenceText: Three-month LME aluminum futures reached $3,571 per metric ton on April 13
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the specific LME aluminum futures price of $3,571 per metric ton directly stated in the Investing.com source. This is already in USD per metric ton format as required.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The current US Midwest aluminum premium is listed as 1,793.99 in the source. Based on the contract notation (LUPc1) and standard market conventions, this is expressed in cents per pound. Converting to USD/lb: 1,793.99 cents ÷ 100 = 17.94 USD/lb
